outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Israel says it will begin direct negotiations with Lebanon as US prepares for Iran ceasefire talks
outlets.summary: CNN covers the diplomatic developments as Israel agrees to Lebanon talks while Lebanon death toll rises to 1,888.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: At least 182 killed as Israel strikes central Beirut after saying Iran truce doesn't apply there
outlets.summary: WaPo focuses on civilian casualties in Beirut from Israeli strikes during ceasefire.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: President Trump vows 'positive action' as ceasefire agreement with Iran reached
outlets.summary: Fox highlights Trump's leadership in achieving ceasefire and optimism about peace deal.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump warns strikes will resume if Iran doesn't agree to his terms
outlets.summary: NPR covers Hegseth's victory declaration and Trump's warnings about ceasefire conditions.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Israel to hold ceasefire talks with Lebanon
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera provides comprehensive liveblog coverage of ceasefire disputes and Lebanon strikes.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: A fragile US-Iran ceasefire shows cracks as attacks continue across the region
outlets.summary: BBC/OPB analysis of ceasefire fragility as Lebanon strikes continue.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF chief: Iran is 'much weaker,' Israel is prepared to return to combat 'at any moment'
outlets.summary: ToI covers IDF chief's visit to Bint Jbeil, Hezbollah rockets, and Netanyahu's Lebanon negotiations order.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF 98th Division captures nearly all of Bint Jbeil
outlets.summary: JPost reports on IDF ground operations in southern Lebanon.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: President Pezeshkian: Iranians will continue to stand together after ceasefire
outlets.summary: PressTV frames ceasefire as Iranian victory, highlights Pezeshkian's unity message.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran's Supreme Leader vows revenge, says Hormuz entering 'new phase'
outlets.summary: Iranian media amplifies Mojtaba Khamenei's first statement vowing revenge against US and Israel.
